name: LEASINVEST REAL ESTATE
summary: LEASINVEST REAL ESTATE is a public regulated real estate company (SIR/GVV) investing in high-quality buildings located in the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg, Belgium, Switzerland, Austria and Germany. The company's portfolio is diversified across office buildings, retail properties and logistics assets, with a focus on prime locations and long-term leases. Leasinvest Real Estate is headquartered in Antwerp, Belgium.
